Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 246 

VBP_ADJSTMT_PCT 

LABEL: Value Based Purchasing (VBP) Adjustment Percent 

DESCRIPTION: Under the Hospital Value Based Purchasing (HVBP) program, the percent used to identify an adjustment 
made to certain subsection (d) IPPS hospitals base operating DRG amount, in accordance with their Total 
Performance Score (TPS) as required by the Affordable Care Act (ACA). This is the Value Based
